creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Better use this address for WWW: 

https://pimalaya.org/himalaya/

(<https://github.com/soywod/himalaya/> 'About' directs readers to <https://pimalaya.org/himalaya/docs/index.html>, that's 404 not found. I have sent an email about the 404.)

In the introduction there, you might find something to add to your description in the patch. 

Thanks
